chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 435 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.2345/2019 03.10.2025 Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference application which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969 Judge Judge Amjad
